title: The Ancient Shandia Village
description: Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Musse, Shandia villager, Shandia warrior. Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Will be offered up to the gods.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: That you've unleashed god's wrath upon us!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: Wait! Wait! Don't rush into things!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, wait! This isn't what you promised!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: We still have some time left! Stop!

summary: Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.
